Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award For Partition And To Enter Judgment
Off Calendar Oct-25-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

PETITIONERS CYNTHIA MCNULTY and KELLAN MCNULTY's Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award For Partition And To Enter Judgment is GRANTED. Non-opposition filed.

Prevailing party to submit a proposed order.
